content: {"summary":"Added app-layer user text moderation in src/lib/inputSecurity.ts with env-configurable VITE_RAW_TEXT_DENYLIST plus link and phone-like number blocking. Wired to community chat messages, community requests, community poll composer, dashboard/onboarding poll comments, anonymous landing question submission, and local/mock persistence paths. Verification blocked by invalid ancestor C:/Users/willi/package.json; helper smoke test via tsx passed."}
